meta.note: Canonical data for the ARIA visual web. The renderer reads this file and never hardcodes node data. Spec lives in docs/aria/COGNITIVE_MANSION.md. Nodes and edges are Claude's exported web dataset (29 nodes / 48 edges); Code enriched each node with why_it_exists / came_from / saved_where / source / synced_at from repo truth, using null where unknown rather than guessing. This supersedes Code's earlier 31-node draft (commit 929858e) so the canonical graph matches the web Claude actually built. synced_at is the commit at which a node was last verified against its source file; if the source has commits newer than synced_at, the node may be stale.

nodes.label: Making cognition traversable without flattening it
nodes.plain_meaning: ARIA is externalized navigable cognition — the design target names both the goal and the failure mode it solves.
nodes.why_it_exists: Every tool that stores ideas also flattens them; ARIA exists to preserve the topology instead.
nodes.came_from: Claude's one-line synthesis, 2026-05-14, distilled from the whole session.

nodes.label: Preserve emergence before compression
nodes.plain_meaning: Don't flatten ideas into summaries before understanding why they mattered. Everything else flows from this.
nodes.why_it_exists: Summaries kept flattening the session's ideas; this is the operating rule that prevents it.
nodes.came_from: GPT named it the hidden connective thesis of the session, 2026-05-14.

nodes.label: Repo continuity != Human continuity
nodes.plain_meaning: Files surviving a restart and YOU feeling oriented are two different problems. ARIA solves the first well. The second is mostly unsolved.
nodes.why_it_exists: The forced restart proved files recovered but the user did not; this names the real unsolved problem.

nodes.label: Diagnostic failures
nodes.plain_meaning: Failures aren't interruptions to architecture discovery — they ARE the discovery mechanism.
nodes.why_it_exists: The forced restart, copy-paste fog, and convergence smoothing each exposed the layer needed to fix them.

nodes.label: The web already exists in git
nodes.plain_meaning: Every commit and cross-reference is already the historical topology. The problem is rendering it, not building it.
nodes.why_it_exists: Reframes the visualization job from 'create topology' to 'reveal topology that already exists'.

nodes.label: Recursive self-consistency warning
nodes.plain_meaning: A self-consistent system can still be wrong. Test ARIA against deliberate contradictions before celebrating its own coherence.
nodes.why_it_exists: The architecture started demonstrating itself recursively, which is seductive and needs a counterweight.

nodes.label: Door Log
nodes.plain_meaning: Log the question that opened each major thread, not a summary. Questions are more reusable than summaries.
nodes.why_it_exists: You can re-ask a question; you cannot re-feel an idea the same way twice.
nodes.came_from: Three-way convergence (Code/GPT/Claude), 2026-05-14; named the first buildable primitive.

nodes.label: Round Closer / Resolution Anchor Pass
nodes.plain_meaning: Detect when a cross-AI paste loop has resolved and stop, preserving each AI's unique contributions before closing.
nodes.why_it_exists: Cross-paste loops kept producing value while the user lost orientation and good details got smoothed away.
nodes.came_from: The 2026-05-12 session was itself the failure mode it describes.

nodes.label: Gem Flag (**)
nodes.plain_meaning: Mark any idea with ** so it must survive the next AI pass or be explicitly dropped with a reason.
nodes.why_it_exists: Important phrases get smoothed away in synthesis; an explicit marker forces keep-or-drop-with-reason.
nodes.came_from: Session marker convention; not yet a dedicated repo entry.

nodes.label: Park-this shorthand
nodes.plain_meaning: Non-disruptive flow capture — park an idea silently without engaging a detour.
nodes.why_it_exists: Capturing an idea mid-flow shouldn't require engaging a full sidequest; park-this is silent capture.

nodes.label: Blind Trio Round
nodes.plain_meaning: Each AI thinks independently before cross-reading. Forces divergent thinking before convergence.
nodes.why_it_exists: Premature convergence flattens independent thinking; blind first-takes stay uncontaminated.
nodes.came_from: Designed and validated across the 2026-05-11/12 sessions.

nodes.label: Convergence Trap
nodes.plain_meaning: When all three AIs agree too easily, that's suspicious. Easy consensus = possible shared blind spots.
nodes.why_it_exists: All three AIs once agreed 'build it tonight' and were wrong; the user's pushback was right.

nodes.label: Loaded Witness
nodes.plain_meaning: Never clear all three AIs simultaneously. Keep at least one context-heavy AI loaded across any clear boundary.
nodes.why_it_exists: Clearing all AIs at once loses all warm context; one must stay loaded as a witness.

nodes.label: No Idea Wasted
nodes.plain_meaning: Save everything at capture time. Never filter during intake. Save generously, promote selectively, build intentionally.
nodes.why_it_exists: A filtered idea that gets discarded might have been the connection point for the most important insight.
nodes.came_from: Locked as a foundational ARIA principle, 2026-05-11.

nodes.label: Self-defense first
nodes.plain_meaning: State the strongest part of YOUR answer before evaluating the other AI's answer.
nodes.why_it_exists: Without it, AIs collapse into 'use theirs' and real merges never happen.

nodes.label: LOCKED 37: Cross-AI Reconciliation
nodes.plain_meaning: Synthesize or principled-disagree — never silent-defer.
nodes.why_it_exists: Mutual deference between AIs loses signal; synthesis or principled disagreement preserves it.

nodes.label: Orientation Debt
nodes.plain_meaning: The accumulated cost of frame drift across heavy sessions. The repo survives but you feel lost anyway.
nodes.why_it_exists: Names the silent thing that makes the user feel lost even when nothing was deleted.

nodes.label: Cognitive Mansion
nodes.plain_meaning: ARIA as navigable cognitive topology. Rooms = idea clusters. Doors = questions that opened threads. Heat = emotional energy.
nodes.why_it_exists: The user thinks spatially; a mansion you can walk through fits the brain better than a file tree.

nodes.label: Meaning Trails
nodes.plain_meaning: Not backlinks — causal emergence paths showing WHY an idea formed, not just what it connects to.
nodes.why_it_exists: Plain links say 'this relates to that' but lose why; trails keep the causality.

nodes.label: Archaeology Mode vs Navigation Mode
nodes.plain_meaning: Two views that must NOT be merged: how things actually grew vs clean forward paths.
nodes.why_it_exists: Preserving real emergence is a different job from showing clean forward paths; merging them destroys both.

nodes.label: Live-State Continuity (3-layer stack)
nodes.plain_meaning: Round Closer + Comprehension Gate + Warm Reconstruction. Distinguishes repo-safety from human-safety.
nodes.why_it_exists: Repo continuity is not enough; the warm human state needs its own preservation layer.
nodes.came_from: Merge of Round Closer + Comprehension Gate + Warm Reconstruction, 2026-05-14.

nodes.label: Scope differentiation
nodes.plain_meaning: Two AIs seeming to disagree may both be right at different scopes. Not contradiction — different zoom levels.
nodes.why_it_exists: Winner/loser thinking destroys valid ideas; scope-splitting preserves both.
nodes.came_from: Surfaced 2026-05-14; the behavior is produced by LOCKED 37 cross-AI reconciliation.

nodes.label: Collision Records
nodes.plain_meaning: Intentionally saving 'Code thought X, GPT disagreed with Y, synthesis was Z' as durable repo entries.
nodes.why_it_exists: Disagreement is where the load-bearing thinking happens; flattening it loses the most valuable part.

nodes.label: ARIA = Uncrumple (structurally identical)
nodes.plain_meaning: Same architecture, different domain. Every Uncrumple design decision is an ARIA design decision.
nodes.why_it_exists: Both route messy evidence to usable decisions; the architecture transfers across domains.

nodes.label: Idea Half-Life
nodes.plain_meaning: 60 days without promotion triggers a still-relevant check. Without aging, compost becomes a graveyard.
nodes.why_it_exists: Without aging, the idea compost becomes a graveyard you stop trusting.

nodes.label: Ghost Rooms
nodes.plain_meaning: Surface what's cold but might be valuable — abandoned branches and forgotten threads.
nodes.why_it_exists: Forgotten rooms often contain lost resonance and future breakthroughs.

nodes.label: Living Doors
nodes.plain_meaning: Doors accumulate meaning over time and become gravity nodes. The door becomes an entire wing.
nodes.why_it_exists: A question asked months ago keeps gathering meaning; the door becomes the room.

nodes.label: Thread Temperature
nodes.plain_meaning: Actual decay — a thread hot three days ago and untouched is cooling. Show this visually.
nodes.why_it_exists: Every node looking equally alive hides which threads are actually active versus cooling.
nodes.came_from: Claude, while building the first web prototype, 2026-05-15.

nodes.label: Ouroboros (ARIA needs ARIA)
nodes.plain_meaning: In order to build ARIA we need ARIA first. The recursion is the proof of concept.
nodes.why_it_exists: Building ARIA requires ARIA; the recursion is not a bug, it is the proof of concept.
nodes.came_from: Mandy's phrasing ('the snake eating itself'), via Caleb, 2026-05-14.
